description_long: This is a medium-sized, round, open-topped bucket with a smooth, slightly flared rim and a gently curved body. The bucket is made of a light blue plastic material, with subtle marbling and faint surface marks visible throughout, giving it a utilitarian yet clean appearance. The rim is noticeably thicker and projects outward, likely for added strength and easier handling. There are no visible handles, lids, or reinforcements, and the surface is uniformly colored without any labels or markings. The interior appears hollow and smooth, suitable for holding liquids or loose materials. Its size and construction suggest it is intended for general-purpose use in urban or household settings.
description: A light blue, round plastic bucket with a flared rim and smooth, unmarked surface. It is open-topped and lacks handles or visible reinforcements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, flared rim, and smooth blue surface with no handles or markings.
description_view_1: Similar to the front, this view highlights the uniform curvature and the absence of any side features or handles.
description_view_2: This angle shows the bucket's consistent shape and color, with the rim's thickness and smoothness clearly visible.
description_view_3: The rear view maintains the same smooth, unadorned blue surface and open top, confirming the lack of handles or reinforcements.
